case_title: BANCROFT DAVID P VS QUAKE CITY SHUTTLE, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,572.93 FILED BY BANCROFT DAVID P AS TO DEFENDANT QUAKE CITY SHUTTLE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
